ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol of the company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "headquarters_location" TEXT /* Location of the company's headquarters */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "ceo_name" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the company's website */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "stock_price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price record */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "price" REAL /* Stock price */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price record */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Volume of shares traded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_capitalization" (
  "market_cap_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market capitalization record */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "amount" REAL /* Market capitalization amount */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market capitalization record */,
  "change_amount" REAL /* Change in market capitalization from the previous day */,
  "change_percentage" REAL /* Percentage change in market capitalization from the previous day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_cap_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_capitalization_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ipo_year" (
  "ipo_year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each IPO year record */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the company went IPO */,
  "ipo_price" REAL /* Price at which the company went IPO */,
  "ipo_volume" TEXT /* Number of shares sold at IPO */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ipo_year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ipo_year_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_sectors" (
  "company_sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company-sector record */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_sectors_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_sectors_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_industries" (
  "company_industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company-industry record */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_industries_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_industries_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stock exchange */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the stock exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_exchanges" (
  "company_exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company-exchange record */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_exchanges_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_exchanges_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES stock_exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financials" (
  "financial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial record */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue */,
  "net_income" REAL /* Net income */,
  "gross_profit" REAL /* Gross profit of the company */,
  "operating_income" REAL /* Operating income of the company */,
  "ebitda" REAL /* Earnings Before Interest, Taxes, Depreciation, and Amortization */,
  "debt" REAL /* Total debt of the company */,
  "cash" REAL /* Total cash of the company */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the financial report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financials_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the news article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the news article */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_articles_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regulatory_filings" (
  "filing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regulatory filing */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "filing_type" TEXT /* Type of regulatory filing */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the regulatory filing */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the regulatory filing */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the regulatory filing */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the regulatory filing */,
  "filing_date" TEXT /* Date the filing was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("filing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regulatory_filings_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)
